meaning: n.法国诺曼第人adj.诺曼第的,诺曼第人[语]的
examples: I want to know what happened to Norman.
We visited the ruins of a Norman castle.
Norman cut open his pie and squirted tomato sauce into it.

The competition will be judged by wildlife photographers Craig Potton, Kim Westerskov, and Norman Heke.
